ns0:entry.ns0:title: 648540858/wvp-GB28181-pro
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/648540858/wvp-GB28181-pro
Language: java
基于GB28181-2016、部标808、部标1078标准实现的开箱即用的网络视频平台。自带管理页面，支持NAT穿透，支持海康、大华、宇视等品牌的IPC、NVR接入。支持国标级联，支持将普通摄像机/直播流/直播推流转国标共享到国标平台。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ArcadeData/arcadedb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ArcadeData/arcadedb
Language: java
ArcadeDB Multi-Model Database, one DBMS that supports SQL, Cypher, Gremlin, HTTP/JSON, MongoDB and Redis. ArcadeDB is a conceptual fork of OrientDB, the first Multi-Model DBMS. ArcadeDB supports Vector Embeddings.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AutoMQ/automq
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AutoMQ/automq
Language: java
Diskless Kafka® on S3. 10x Cost-Effective. No Cross-AZ Traffic Cost. Autoscale in seconds. Single-digit ms latency. Multi-AZ Availability.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenAPITools/openapi-generator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenAPITools/openapi-generator
Language: java
OpenAPI Generator allows generation of API client libraries (SDK generation), server stubs, documentation and configuration automatically given an OpenAPI Spec (v2, v3)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/dolphinscheduler
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/dolphinscheduler
Language: java
Apache DolphinScheduler is the modern data orchestration platform. Agile to create high performance workflow with low-code

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/doris
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/doris
Language: java
Apache Doris is an easy-to-use, high performance and unified analytics database.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/flink
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/flink
Language: java
Apache Flink

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/kafka
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/kafka
Language: java
Apache Kafka - A distributed event streaming platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/tika
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/tika
Language: java
The Apache Tika toolkit detects and extracts metadata and text from over a thousand different file types (such as PPT, XLS, and PDF).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: conductor-oss/conductor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor
Language: java
Conductor is an event driven agentic workflow engine providing durable and highly resilient execution engine for applications and AI Agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dataease/dataease
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dataease/dataease
Language: java
🔥 人人可用的开源 BI 工具，数据可视化神器。An open-source BI tool alternative to Tableau.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: googleapis/google-cloud-java
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/googleapis/google-cloud-java
Language: java
Google Cloud Client Library for Java

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iflytek/skillhub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iflytek/skillhub
Language: java
Self-hosted, open-source agent skill registry for enterprises. Publish & version skill packages, govern with RBAC and audit logs, deploy on-premise with Docker or Kubernetes.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jishenghua/jshERP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jishenghua/jshERP
Language: java
管伊佳ERP（原名华夏ERP）基于SpringBoot框架和SaaS模式，立志为中小企业提供开源好用的ERP软件，目前专注进销存+财务功能。主要模块有零售管理、采购管理、销售管理、仓库管理、财务管理、报表查询、系统管理等。支持预付款、收入支出、仓库调拨、组装拆卸、订单等特色功能。拥有库存状况、出入库统计等报表。同时对角色和权限进行了细致全面控制，精确到每个按钮和菜单。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: keycloak/keycloak
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak
Language: java
Open Source Identity and Access Management For Modern Applications and Services

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openmrs/openmrs-core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openmrs/openmrs-core
Language: java
OpenMRS API and web application code

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: java

Language: java
Open-source IoT Platform - Device management, data collection, processing and visualization.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: trinodb/trino
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/trinodb/trino
Language: java
Official repository of Trino, the distributed SQL query engine for big data, formerly known as PrestoSQL (https://trino.io)
